reviews.comment:
16/6/22  23:00 aproximadamente me acerco a cargar combustible gas oil ., antes de las 00:00 donde más diarios informaron que el gasoil aumentaba un 12%., como es de costumbre lo hago en el ACA., para sorpresa ya habían aumentado el combustible antes del horario. Me acerqué a las demás estaciones de servicio Shell, YPF, Puma., y la demás todavía no habían aumentado como es debido porque no habi pasado la media noche. Señores con estos avivamientos pierden clientes., no se abusen de la gente. Cliente totalmente desconforme.

(Translated by Google)
On June 16, 2022, at approximately 11:00 PM, I went to fill up with diesel fuel. Before midnight, when most newspapers reported that diesel prices would increase by 12%, I went to the ACA station, as usual. To my surprise, they had already raised the price before midnight. I went to other service stations—Shell, YPF, and Puma—and they hadn't yet raised their prices as they should have, since it wasn't past midnight. Gentlemen, with these price gouging tactics, you're losing customers. Don't take advantage of people. A completely dissatisfied customer.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPbmFqSDhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención los baños muy limpios .
Pase relativamente tarde no pude comprar ya esta cerrado el servicompras

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, very clean bathrooms.
I arrived relatively late, but couldn't make any purchases since the shopping center is closed.

reviewReply.comment: Sepa disculparnos, en esta epoca nuestros horarios de servicompras estan algo reducidos. Gracias por su opinion.
